scripts.dev: bun run dev:www & bun run dev:docs & bun run dev:lab & bun run dev:build & bun run dev:styleforge & bun run dev:dbviz & bun run dev:prompt-designer & bun run dev:mcp & bun run dev:remotion & bun run dev:vibe
scripts.build: bun run build:www && bun run build:docs && bun run build:lab && bun run build:build && bun run build:dbviz && bun run build:prompt-designer && bun run build:mcp && bun run build:vibe
scripts.deploy:mcp: bun run --filter @stealthis/mcp catalog && bun run --filter @stealthis/mcp build && bun run --filter @stealthis/mcp deploy
scripts.deploy: bunx wrangler pages deploy apps/www/dist --project-name stealthis-www --branch main && bunx wrangler pages deploy apps/docs/dist --project-name stealthis-docs --branch main && bunx wrangler pages deploy apps/lab/dist --project-name stealthis-lab --branch main && bunx wrangler pages deploy apps/build/dist --project-name stealthis-build --branch main && bunx wrangler pages deploy apps/styleforge/dist --project-name stealthis-styleforge --branch main && bunx wrangler pages deploy apps/dbviz/dist --project-name stealthis-dbviz --branch main && bunx wrangler pages deploy apps/prompt-designer/dist --project-name stealthis-prompt-designer --branch main && bun run deploy:mcp
